headline: House overwhelms Senate with defense bill passage as judicial nominations roll forward in upper chamber.

senate.lastSessionSummary: The Senate confirmed two federal judges: Benjamin M. Flowers to the Sixth Circuit by 49-46, and Michael C. Martin to the Eastern District of Michigan by 62-36. Cloture motions advanced on the Clayton nomination for Director of National Intelligence and the Traynor nomination for Eighth Circuit judge, setting up final votes Thursday. S.J. Res. 180 on Iran hostilities awaits a discharge motion.

onTheFloor.title: Confirmation of Walter Clayton as Director of National Intelligence
Daniel Mack Traynor to be United States Circuit Judge for the Eighth Circuit

onTheFloor.title: Thirty-three bills introduced covering various legislative matters

house.lastSessionSummary: The House passed the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2027 (H.R. 8800) by 216-212, authorizing military appropriations and defense activities. Dozens of amendments addressing readiness, supply chain security, and military personnel programs were agreed to during floor debate.

onTheFloor.title: National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2027 authorizing military appropriations and personnel strengths
